decisions: Project blocks live in .workflow/ — the project artifact directory
Specs 26-29 form Phase 7: project structure, execution primitives, verification
forEach when: conditional applies globally (before iteration starts), not per-iteration — per-iteration conditions require when to be expressible without forEach-scoped variables at the top level
command step fails on non-zero exit (unlike gate which always returns completed with passed: true/false)
todos: Delete old .md demo agents (demo proved out with .agent.yaml)
Remove dead code: writeStepOutput in state.ts

issues.description: Expression parser has known limitation with adjacent ${{ }}${{ }} expressions in a single string — whole-value regex can misparse them. Pre-existing, not introduced by spec 27.

session.last_action: Completed specs 26-27: project blocks in .workflow/, forEach and command step types (333 tests)
session.next_action: Implement spec 28: verification as typed results (verifier-output schema, verifier agent spec, templates)
